description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by dense landscaping, including a variety of trees, shrubs, and flowering bushes. The building features a flat roof with multiple skylights and a mix of light and dark exterior wall finishes, likely stucco and wood or composite panels. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a paved walkway, and a backyard area with a swimming pool and patio. The lush greenery forms a natural privacy barrier around the house, with a mix of evergreen and deciduous trees. The overall layout is spacious, with the house centrally positioned within a rectangular lot.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow set within a lush, tree-filled lot, featuring large windows, a driveway, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, dense tree coverage, and the house nestled centrally within the lot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the backyard pool area partially visible through the trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with large windows and the surrounding landscaping, including flowering bushes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway entrance, more of the pool area, and the extensive tree coverage along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
